calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Set For Trial On Sep-21-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Yun Peng 669-329-7691 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Senjaine/Mimi Lain, Mandarin Interpreter #301079 assists Plaintiff.
Douglas Hewlett, Esq. 213-443-7571 Arentfox Schiff LLP for Defendant.
Court Reporter: Donna Boulger, CSR #6162, 714-269-7179, dboulger@gmail.com.

ARGUED. The Court received a timely notice to contest from Defense. Mr. Hewlett contests the portions of the court's tentative ruling overruling the demurrer to causes of action 1,4,and 5 (promissory estoppel, defamation and IIED) Mr. Hewlett address elements 3 and 4.

Mr. Peng responds; sexual allegation, promissory estoppel, mental distress, removed forcibly and inappropriately.

After arguments, The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT APPLE INC.'s DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant Apple, Inc.'s demurrer to Plaintiff Yun Peng's second amended complaint (SAC) is Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Donna Boulger, CSR #6162, 714-269-7179, dboulger@gmail.com.Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, an order sustaining in part without leave to amend and overruling in part Defendant Apple inc.'s demurrer to plaintiff's second amended complaint. (see scanned order for details)***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Continued To Dec-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Continued To Oct-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF YUN PENG's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint.

Off calendar. Motion withdrawn.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: (via Zoom videoconference).
YUN PENG, Tel:669 329 7691 for plaintiff in PRO PER.
CATHERINE J. BAUMGARTNER, ESQ. ARENTFOX SCHIFF LLP. Tel: 415.757.5500 for defendant.
Court Reporter: Shiela Pham, CSR# 13293,email: calendar-cal@Veritex.com
Court Interprreter Mandarin: Mimi Lain Cert. #301079, Tel: 415-378-9217,email: Mimi.Lain@gmail.com.

Hearing is held. Defense counsel contested the tentative ruling. The court interpreter translated all arguments for the plaintiff. After reviewing the pleadings and hearing oral arguments, the Court rules as follows:

Defendant Apple Inc.'s demurrer to the Complaint is OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Court Reporter: Shiela Pham, CSR# 13293 Reported. (302/JMQ)

****An ORDER Partially granting defendant Apple, Inc.'s demurrer to plaintiff's complaint signed after the hearing***
